approve(address,uint256).notice: Approves the given address to transfer the WETH on behalf of the caller.

balanceOf(address).notice: Returns the balance of the given address.

decimals().notice: Returns the number of decimals the token uses.

delay().notice: Returns the withdrawal delay in seconds.

deposit().notice: Allows WETH to be deposited by sending ether to the contract.

hold(address).notice: Allows the owner to recover from error cases by pulling all WETH from a specific owner.

unlock(address,uint256).notice: Unlocks withdrawals for the sender's account, after a time delay.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotProxyAdminOwner().notice: Thrown when the caller is not the ProxyAdmin owner.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotResolvedDelegateP.notice: Thrown when the current contract is not a ResolvedDelegateProxy.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_NotSharedProxyAdminO.notice: Thrown when the ProxyAdmin owner of the current contract is not the same as the         ProxyAdmin owner of the other Proxy address provided.

ProxyAdminOwnedBase_ProxyAdminNotFound().notice: Thrown when the ProxyAdmin owner of the current contract is not found.

ReinitializableBase_ZeroInitVersion().notice: Thrown when the initialization version is zero.

userdoc.notice: DelayedWETH is an extension to WETH9 that allows for delayed withdrawals. Accounts must trigger an unlock         function before they can withdraw WETH. Accounts must trigger unlock by specifying a sub-account and an         amount of WETH to unlock. Accounts can trigger the unlock function at any time, but must wait a delay         period before they can withdraw after the unlock function is triggered. DelayedWETH is designed to be used         by the DisputeGame contracts where unlock will only be triggered after a dispute is resolved. DelayedWETH         is meant to sit behind a proxy contract and has an owner address that can pull WETH from any account and         can recover ETH from the contract itself. Variable and function naming vaguely follows the vibe of WETH9.         Not the prettiest contract in the world, but it gets the job done.
